citation_and_locator: Wong, Anita M.-Y. 2023. Language Sample Analysis in Clinical Linguistics, Grammatical Analysis of Cantonese Samples, printed p. 55 / PDF p. 65
what_it_supports: Defines end-attached tag questions; lists `係唔係`, `好唔好`, `得唔得`; gives `你唔去喇，係唔係呀？`; distinguishes intonation and echo questions.
limit: Descriptive coding framework; does not establish terminal `係咪`, exhaustive inventory, prosody, polarity matching, or population-wide judgments.

citation_and_locator: Huang, Yu-hsin, One-soon Her, and Stano Kong. 2025. Revisiting the Taxonomy of Interrogatives in Cantonese. Tsing Hua Journal of Chinese Studies 55(1):157–195; pp. 180–183
what_it_supports: Standalone and question-attachment diagnostics for `係唔係`; structural independence from host; contrasts tags with bound polar particles `aa4/he2`.
limit: Biclausal analysis draws on crosslinguistic work; no direct terminal `係咪` or full prosodic experiment.

citation_and_locator: Li, Clare. 2017. The Syntactic and Pragmatic Properties of A-not-A Question in Chinese. MA thesis, University of Canterbury; pp. 52–55 and 74–75
what_it_supports: Distinguishes tag uses from regular clause-internal A-not-A questions.
limit: Small film sample does not establish frequency or a complete Cantonese tag grammar.
